title: My Body and I Are on the Same Team
subtitle: An affirmation for shifting from fighting the body's signals to cooperating with them
excerpt: A short affirmation from Day 23 of a 30-day sleep program. The statement names the shift from overriding the body's energy and rest signals to working with them, not as a future intention, but as the current direction of travel.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 23 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short affirmation for building cooperation between the mind's productivity habits and the body's natural rhythms. The statement names where things are heading: not a perfect record of listening, but the direction of the practice.
My body and I are on the same team. I listen to its signals. I rest without guilt and act without pressure. We flow together.
Say it three times, slow. Hand on the centre of your chest or lower belly. If a specific instance of overriding a body signal comes to mind, let it surface without judgment and let it pass.
Adapted from Day 23 of SLEEP: A 30-Day Tapping Intensive (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
